raw_consumer_statement: I am filing this complaint against American Express regarding its refusal to properly investigate an unauthorized credit card charge. On XX/XX/year>, I authorized a single transaction in the amount of {$960.00} at the merchant XXXX  XXXX. I did not authorize, recognize, or consent to an additional charge of {$3400.00} that appeared later. Authorization for one transaction does not constitute authorization for a subsequent or additional transaction. Despite clear evidence of an unauthorized additional charge, American Express denied my dispute and stated that because I handed my card to the merchant for the authorized {$960.00} transaction, I consented to all subsequent charges. American Express further stated it would only rule in my favor if the merchant provided a letter agreeing to reimburse me, improperly shifting the burden of proof to the consumer.
